title: The Deadliest Ocean Crossing Actually Protects You
description:
The Drake passage is known to be one of the most dangerous crossings in the world... 

Pressure changes, unimpeded winds, and ocean currents make for exceptionally chaotic seas, but the deadly conditions here and everything that creates them also plays a vital role in protecting our planet.

Subscribe to learn more!

#DrakePassage #Weather #ClimateChange #Science #shorts
